You'll Learn React Eventually, So Why Not Now? — React Basics: Building a TodoList (Part 1) - (10)
You'll Learn React Eventually, So Why Not Now?

In this chapter we're going to actually build something small. The whole point is to pull together everything we've covered so far, because knowledge with zero output is honestly kind of useless. So let's roll up our sleeves and get some practice in. We'll build a TodoList that adds items, marks them done with a checkbox, shows a count, and clears everything at once.
